description_long: This obelisk features a modern, geometric design with a combination of polished black stone and speckled beige granite. The structure consists of a rectangular black slab set against a taller, offset beige granite slab, both rising from a broad, tiered base. The base is composed of two stacked rectangular platforms, also made of the same speckled granite, providing stability and visual weight. The black slab is flush with the left side of the base, while the granite slab is offset to the right, creating a striking asymmetrical profile. The surfaces are smooth and glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing the contrast between the two materials. There are no visible inscriptions or decorative carvings, giving the obelisk a minimalist and contemporary appearance.
description: A modern obelisk with a glossy black slab and a taller speckled granite slab, both set on a wide, tiered granite base. The design is minimalist and geometric, with smooth, reflective surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black slab on the left and the taller granite slab on the right, both rising from a broad, tiered granite base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the base and the thickness of both slabs, with the black slab in front and the granite slab behind.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the granite slab on the right and the black slab on the left, both flush with the base, emphasizing the asymmetrical design.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the granite slab in front and the black slab behind, with the layered granite base clearly visible.
attribute_base_design: The base consists of two stacked rectangular granite platforms, with the upper platform slightly smaller than the lower, creating a stepped effect. Both platforms are made of speckled beige granite and have smooth, polished surfaces.
attribute_tip_design: The tips of both slabs are flat and squared off, with no tapering or decorative features, maintaining a minimalist, geometric profile.
